name: einhaus-gruppe
message: Services from a single source - since 2003The Einhaus Group GmbH is one of the first to offer its sales partners individual solutions in the field of electronics insurance. You receive up-to-date insurance products that ensure the satisfaction of your customers. You operate an attractive additional business and generate additional sales. The Einhaus Group takes care of all processes for you, from contract management and customer care to handling damage claims, including repair management and logistics.
